query: UPDATE monitored_groups SET instanceId = 30004 WHERE instanceId = 30003; UPDATE monitored_groups SET instanceId = 30004 WHERE instanceId = 30002; SELECT instanceId, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(buscarOfertas) as comBuscarOfertas FROM monitored_groups GROUP BY instanceId;
